data.title: 国际服2024新年贺信暨新年礼物
data.summary: [Developer's Letter & Special Gift Notice] Happy New Year, Sensei! May your 2024 be full of happines
data.body:
[Developer's Letter & Special Gift Notice]

Happy New Year, Sensei!
May your 2024 be full of happiness!

Check out the Developer's Letter and claim your special New Year gift!

🗓️Period: 1/1 (Mon) 1:00 AM – 1/8 (Mon) 2:59 PM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=2455943
